name: sl_countermeasure_map.csv
why_it_exists: Every access pack / SL map / gap-lineage report is a durable operational asset — must be addressable.

sample_rows: LOW_CONCERN: Tissue-specific expression (30% lines near-zero). Q25 threshold=0.070 (near-zero). Sparse hits (n=7) may reflect tissue-specific biology.

top_values: SEVERE_LINEAGE_CONFOUND: Q75 group is 37% lymphoid/myeloid vs solid-tumor-dominated Q25. Hits likely reflect hematologic lineage essentialities, not BCL2-driven resistance biology.
LOW_CONCERN: No major lineage confound identified. High hit count (n=206) warrants lineage audit if used in downstream analysis.

MODERATE_EXPRESSION_CAVEAT: HIF1A IQR=1.64 log2TPM+1; 84.7% of lines express >5.0. Q75 vs Q25 split (7.03 vs 5.39) is narrow. HIF1A activity is post-translationally regulated by O2 tension absent in standard culture.
